_meta: 2026 roster accuracy audit — 5 parallel web-research agents (June 2026, cited). The model's fusion_table player->team was verified across ~60 top skill players: HIGHLY accurate. This file records the real-data exceptions.

non_usable.Brandon Aiyuk: SF voided 2026 guarantees, intends to release/trade; has not played since Oct-2024 multi-ligament knee injury. Not a usable 2026 SF WR (transaction unresolved as of June 2026). [espn/nfl.com]

free_agents_unsigned_confirmed.Tyreek Hill: released by MIA 2/16/2026, rehabbing 2025 leg injury, unsigned (early-season risk once signed)
free_agents_unsigned_confirmed.Darren Waller: played 2025 MIA, UFA, undecided/unsigned (not formally re-retired)

injury_watch_rostered.Zach Charbonnet: SEA — torn ACL (Jan 2026 playoffs), surgery Feb 20 2026; rehabbing on roster (NOT on IR), ahead of pace; realistic Oct/Nov return, healthy by fantasy playoffs
injury_watch_rostered.George Kittle: SF — high-Achilles tear Jan 11 2026; ahead of schedule, Week-1 a coin flip, full-go by playoffs
injury_watch_rostered.Tank Dell: HOU — catastrophic multi-ligament knee Dec 2024, missed all 2025; targeting camp/Week-1, early-season ramp plausible, likely healthy by playoffs
injury_watch_rostered.Malik Nabers: NYG — torn ACL Week 4 2025 + offseason cleanup; GM optimistic Week-1, Schefter skeptical; healthy by playoffs
injury_watch_rostered.Jonathon Brooks: CAR — SECOND ACL on same knee (Dec 2024), missed all 2025; CLEARED, took OTA snaps, projects full-go Week-1 with elevated re-injury/durability risk
injury_watch_rostered.Tucker Kraft: GB — torn ACL Nov 2 2025, patellar graft; 'right on schedule', plans Week-1 no pitch count

_availability_meta: Data-backed availability overlay. avail_mult = (17 - games_missed_mid)/17 using the cited June-2026 reporting midpoint of expected regular-season games missed. playoff_ok=true => projected healthy for fantasy playoffs (NFL Weeks 15-17): the injury is a TOTAL flag but NOT a playoff flag. Verified by parallel cited web research (June 28 2026).

Jonathon Brooks.src: panthers.com/lwos/heavy (cleared, 2nd ACL same knee = re-injury risk)

roster_assignments_CONFIRMED_correct: A.J. Brown -> NE (real trade from PHI, post-June-1; model was right, NOT an error)
DK Metcalf + Aaron Rodgers + Michael Pittman Jr. -> PIT

missing_depth_not_errors.note: these are depth/competition omissions in the top-240 cut, not wrong-team errors
